cast.name: Mark Harmon
cast.character: Mickey Knox in Wayne Gale's Reconstruction

cast.name: Chris Renna
cast.character: Prisoner with Swastika Tattoo on Forehead

plot outline: Mickey Knox and Mallory Wilson aren't your typical lovers - after killing her abusive father, they go on a road trip where, every time they stop somewhere, they kill pretty well everyone around them. They do however leave one person alive at every shootout to tell the story and they soon become a media sensation thanks to sensationalized reporting. Told in a highly visual style.
title: Natural Born Killers
